Journal

This is a simple journal template for student reflection. You can customize the prompts and layout as needed. The template includes fields for date, mood, situation, thoughts, emotions, body sensations, reflection, and coping strategies.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Psychology Reflection Journal

This journal does not save. You may download it as a PDF.

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:



 <section aria-label="Psychology Journal"
  style="max-width:820px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#313131;line-height:1.5;">

  <div style="border:1px solid #d9d9d9;border-radius:18px;padding:22px;background:#ffffff;">

    
    <header style="border-left:8px solid #4c4a4f;background:#f2f2f2;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:12px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 6px 0;font-size:1.4rem;">Psychology Reflection Journal</h2>
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">
        <em>This journal does not save. You may download it as a PDF.</em>
      </p>
    </header>

    
    <section style="margin-top:16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:12px;">
      <label>
        <strong>Date</strong>
        <input type="date"
          style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;background:#fafafa;">
      </label>

      <label>
        <strong>Mood</strong>
        <select style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;background:#fafafa;">
          <option value="">Select mood</option>
          <option>Calm</option>
          <option>Anxious</option>
          <option>Happy</option>
          <option>Overwhelmed</option>
          <option>:Tired</option>
          <option>Motivated</option>
        </select>
      </label>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-top:16px;">
      <label><strong>Situation / What happened?</strong></label>
      <textarea rows="3" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;background:#fafafa;"></textarea>
    </section>

    <section style="margin-top:14px;">
      <label><strong>Thoughts</strong></label>
      <textarea rows="3" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;background:#fafafa;"></textarea>
    </section>

    <section style="margin-top:14px;">
      <label><strong>Emotions</strong></label>
      <textarea rows="3" placeholder="(e.g., anxious, excited, frustrated)"
        style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;background:#fafafa;"></textarea>
    </section>

    <section style="margin-top:14px;">
      <label><strong>Body Sensations (optional)</strong></label>
      <textarea rows="2" placeholder="(e.g., tension, fatigue, restlessness)"
        style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;background:#fafafa;"></textarea>
    </section>

    <section style="margin-top:14px;">
      <label><strong>Coping / Next Steps</strong></label>
      <textarea rows="3"
        style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;background:#fafafa;"></textarea>
    </section>

    
    <section style="margin-top:16px;">
      <button onclick="window.print()"
        style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #4c4a4f;background:#4c4a4f;color:#fff;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;"
        aria-label="Download as PDF"
        >
        Download PDF
      </button>
    </section>

  </div>
  </section>

← Back to catalog
